title: Fuse deterministic root and depth-1 vector rounds
methodology: Added a two-round vector fast path that preloaded the root and depth-1 child node values, hashed round 0 and round 1 in scratch, and delayed the first writeback until after the second round.
motivation: Following the brief's combine-successful-elements direction, I combined exp-022 special-case deterministic root rounds with exp-021 depth-1 child caching into a single fused startup path.
